chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 68 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.6 2. For hearing of main case 28.01.2026 This matter is pending since 2018 without any progress. Applicant remains unrepresented without intimation and / or justification on the last date i.e. 29.11.2021; same is the case today. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
